title: poa alpina var. bivonae
intro: Poa alpina var. bivonae, also known as mountain meadow grass or Bivona's alpine grass, is a type of plant that belongs to the Poaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Poa alpina var. bivonae can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
